feed.title: SAP Community - SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
feed.subtitle: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Termination screen attachment mandatory issue
entry.content:
Hi Experts ,

We have a scenario where employee terminates voluntarily by providing termination reason in termination screen at this time attachment section is mandatory but when manager sent back the request the attachment section becomes non mandatory what are the possible ways to fix the issue.Kindly help.

 

Regards

Anu

entry.title: SAP SuccessFactors Time Management: Projects / Implementations
entry.content:
Dear SAP World,

I have a question regarding SuccessFactors Time Management (Time Off, Time Sheet and Time Tracking).

Unfortunately, I cannot find any experiences / showstoppers / typical problems and successes regarding the implementation of SuccessFactors Time Management for larger companies.

Do you have such blogs or can you report on this please?

Particular interest is for companies that operate in more than 30+ countries and also have many blue collar workers.
However, I am open to any experiences. Thank you!

entry.title: How to use a single position for multiple employees?
entry.content:
Hi Experts!

The FTE within a position is set to 2, however, while assigning the position to the second employee the error relating to the position being occupied is thrown. Please suggest steps to be taken for us to use the position against of 2 employees.

entry.title: SAP SFSF Integration Center
entry.content:
Hello all,
Greetings!

In the SAP SFSF integration center, what is the web service we can consume that list employee data and provides employee status via API?

Regards,
Hayery Ribeiro

entry.title: SAP Successfactors National ID Section to be mandatory in Employee Central and onboarding 2.O
entry.content:
Can we make the National ID Section mandatory, also bank details in Candidate onboarding 2.O in personal data collection step in successfactors.

So, the details can be flown in Employee Central.

entry.title: Annualized Salary (custom field) is not automatically populating for Pay Component: Hourly
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

@xavierlegarrec 

We have an Annualized Salary (custom field)

This field is not automatically populating based on the Hourly Rate in the New Hire Screen.

Please note the trace below:

The expression 'payComponentRecurringModel.employmentInfoModel.jobInfoModel.jobInfo_standard_hours.value' is considered to be NULL, as the property 'employmentInfoModel' of 'payComponentRecurringModel' is found to be NULL at 'payComponentRecurringModel.employmentInfoModel'.
 

It seems like the path to get the Standard Weekly hours is incorrect? Please assist

 

Any assistance will be appreciated.

 

Thank you!

Ashlin

entry.title: SAP SF EC Time Management
entry.content:
Hi ,

In the Work Schedule object, we have 3 types of models: simple, period, and schedule. What do they mean, and in what situations do we use them? 

I went through the implementation guide, but it's not detailed there.

Please explain with a suitable example.

Thank you.

entry.title: ADP and EC Integration using ADP Workforce Now
entry.content:
One of my client's USA-based subsidiary implemented ADP Workforce Now as its HCM solution last year. As a result, they plan to establish data integration between ADP and SAP SuccessFactors (SFs) this year.

There is already an API available for data integration between ADP and SFs, which appears to facilitate this process:
ADP Workforce Now - SAP SuccessFactors Integration

Request any information:
Could you introduce us to any case studies of other companies that have built data integration between ADP Workforce Now and SFs using the above API? Specifically, we would like to understand the following:

  • Detailed API specifications and the configuration tasks required on both the ADP and SFs sides.
  • Estimated costs and project timeline for the integration.
  • Potential concerns or challenges associated with the integration.

Appreciate any insights on this topics. Thanks!

entry.title: "Total Team Size" in Story Reports
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Kindly assist to pull "Total Team Size" (not direct reports) in Story Reports.

Thanks and Regards

entry.title: Simulation Feature for Business Rules?
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to know if this feature really exist?

I found someone's blog here, stated that this feature exist.

https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/simulation-feature-sap-successfactors-chapter-12--5yjxc/

Seems I did not find any official document from help.sap.com with regards this specific feature.

Regards,
Reza

entry.title: Past picklist version doesn't show up in past jobinfo record
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a picklist in jobinfo. It has two ACTIVE versions. It has the ISOcountryList picklist as parent picklist.

1st version is from 1900. jan. 1st and has child picklist active values. It also has two global inactive values.

2nd version is from 2025. febr. 1st and all the chlid picklist values are deactivated. only two global values are active. The same values that are inactive in the previous version.

My issue is that when I would like to correct a jobinfo time slice or insert a new jobinfo time slice before 2025 febr. 1st the field presents me only the two global values which are inactive at the time. I would like to see the country spec "old" child values which are active before 2025. ferb 1.

Why dont I see them? Is it expected behavior? 

Child field is connected with parent field in jobinfo. It has worked before we have created the 2nd version of picklists from 2025 febr 1.

 

Thanks,

 

Szilvia

entry.title: Send reminder notification to manager after 48 hours when candidate is in status: 'Manager Review'
entry.content:
In talent pipeline, for any requisition, Once candidate is moved to 'Manager Review' applicant status there is an email notification that is being sent.
Can we set a reminder email for the same to the hiring manager if no action is taken by hiring manager after 48 hours?

Our question is: Is it possible to set a reminder on any status in Talent pipeline, after few hours / days.. Thanks.

entry.title: Has anyone successfully implementing Pay Ranges with Additional Attributes to Pay Ranges?
entry.content:
I'm investigating how feasible it is to add more attribute to the pay ranges for additional filtering beyond pay grade, geozone, legal entity. Has anyone done this successfully? If so, what steps did you take and how many additional attributes were you able to add?

TIA

Leslie

entry.title: Compensation Statements integration with FileNet using SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hi Community,

Compensation statements, generated and accessible within the SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central under Compensation portlet, are available for all employees enrolled in a compensation plan. We want to transfer these statements from SAP SuccessFactors to FileNet using SAP Cloud Platform Integration.

We are currently unable to identify the backend entity associated with the compensation statements within SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central (EC). Could you kindly provide guidance on how to fetch the compensation statements from SAP SuccessFactors EC. Could you kindly advise if there is any workaround solution to facilitate the integration from SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central (EC) to FileNet?

Thanks & Best Regards,
Pavan


Cloud Integration SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central

entry.title: Emergency Contact Self-Service - Field Visibility
entry.content:
Hi everyone, I wanted to check if any other SF customers have found a good way to get around the issue we're facing with the Emergency Contact portlet in EC? 

The issue we have is that, when employees go into the portlet to update their emergency contact details, they are only presented with a subset of fields, and then get an error if they try to save their changes without clicking "Edit Details" to continue adding data into mandatory fields. According to the below KBA, it doesn't sound like there is a way to have all fields display straight away:

https://me.sap.com/notes/3507425/E

Has anyone found a way to get around this, or found any other ways to make this portlet more intuitive to reduce queries to HR?

entry.title: Unable to Access Sandbox Subscription APIs – Getting ECONNRESET Error
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am currently facing an issue while trying to access Sandbox Subscription APIs. It was working fine earlier, but recently, the API calls started failing with the error:

ECONNRESET

Here’s what I’ve tried so far:

Verified API key
Checked if the sandbox environment is active
Ensured correct API endpoint usage
Tried from multiple networks and devices
Despite these efforts, the issue persists. Has anyone else encountered this? Any insights or workarounds would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: CC group not receiving workflow emails
entry.content:
workflow does not have approvers. It only has CC users and Employee & Manager are set up to receive a custom email. However emails are not getting trigger

 

Any help - thank you!

entry.title: Dyanmic Breaks and Gaps in Working Time
entry.content:
Hi,

We are making use of dynamci breaks. The break gets deducted when an employee works more than 5.5 hours. 

Gaps in working time are counted towards break time. 

Currently if the employee takes a 15 minute before (5.5 hours into his shift) the dynamci break deducts the additional 15 minutes correctly. 

However, when an employee takes their 30 minute break after 5.5 hours into their shift, the shift automatically deducts the full 30 minutes (even though he has a gap of 15 minutes in his working time). This is not correct.

 

So if the 15 minute break is taken before 5.5 hours into the shift the system is behaving as expected and deducting a dynamic break of only 15 minutes, however, this is not the case if the 15 minute break is taken after the 5.5 hous. How do I prevent the full 30 minutes being deducted, if 15 minutes have been taken after 5.5 hours into the shift?breaks

Thanks,

Manon

entry.title: SAP SF EC Time Management
entry.content:
Hi All,

There are 3 groups of employees, such as morning shift employees, noon shift employees, and night shift employees. They have to work in 3 different shifts in the same day. 3 shifts of employees should start work on this date: 01/01/1900.

Group A: Morning Shift 6 AM - 2 PM

Group B: Noon Shift 2 PM - 10 PM

Group C: Night Shift 10 PM - 6 AM

Please explain the process for how to create a work schedule for this.

 

This way I created 3 shift patterns (weekly change) for 21 days with different times
6 am - 2pm
2pm - 10pm
10pm - 6am

What is the further process?

entry.title: Generate unique email adresses during the hire process
entry.content:
Hi, 

I need to generate and pre-populate the new hire's email address field, either during the MPH step or immediately after. Any way to achieve this in IC or via business rules?

Thank you for all help.
